title: valeriana sorbifolia var. sorbifolia
intro: Valeriana sorbifolia var. sorbifolia, also known as the Japanese valerian or valerian of the Japanese type, is a plant species in the family Valerianaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of valerenic acid and isovaleric acid, which have been shown to have a sedative and calming effect on the nervous system. The health benefits of Valeriana sorbifolia var. sorbifolia include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as its potential to reduce muscle spasms and inflammation. Valerian root is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
